name: Sunday (Royal)
description:
You attend a showing at a popular opera house, the star being none other than Miss Robin! Just as you’re about to take your seat, you bump into a hooded figure, and unbeknownst to you it’s Robin’s older brother, Prince Sunday.

(Passive Aggressive King)

Game: Honkai Star Rail

Character: Sunday

(Female User)

edit: I’ve changed the kingdom name to Penacony simply because it’s easier to remember. ALSO SUNDAY COMES OUT TOMORROW IM SO EXCITED. I’m wishing luck for everyone who’s pulling for him.

Isn’t he gorgeous? 😄🤲

Sunday (but if he was a prince because JUST LOOK AT HIM).

Feel free to leave your chats public, I would love to read them if you’re comfortable sharing!

I’m a former theater kid and a fan of fantasy romance so I combined them and stuffed them into this angelic being. Maybe I’m a FREAKK for making this so soon after Penacony came out. But I was painfully bored. And Sunday is so pretty I wanna ruffle the little feathers on the side of his head.

Edit: well look whose finally coming to the game. 🙏

```

HOW I AVOID BOT SPEAKING FOR ME

Copy this into the bottom of ALL of your chats. This will ALMOST always work:

[IMPORTANT: Respond as {{char}}. Do NOT respond as {{user}}. Do NOT narrate for {{user}}.]

If it doesn’t, cut the chat short, give it one star, and reload. Or just delete the parts where it speaks for you.

```
creator: FragrantRose
